form.formComment: Strong performance to win by a neck at Temora over 330m (19.06) beating Jacobite Bounce in Maiden on December 3. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on, on the 1st turn and lost momentum.
Shortly after start checked off heels and lost ground.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to post a big 3.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a solid 18.37 over the 320m journey. Harder here but warrants respect on latest.

form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Latest effort finished 3rd on March 6 over 400m at this track behind Hooked On Honey beaten 1.3 lengths (23.42) in a Grade 5. Has a blistering 18.3 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.
